title: YTP: Waffa Haus
description:
In this video, you will learn to appreciate the magic of Waffle House. Because Mark didn't. Would you like to be Mark?

This was made from an old Waffle House training video that taught new hires how to relay orders, and it makes me want to leave bigger tips for the people that work there.

If you loved this, subscribe for more and if you want to support me on Patreon, do so here:
https://www.patreon.com/Captpan6

And you can also follow me on my socials for all sorts of other cool stuff!
